changes: Added local observability JSONL store with secret masking, duplicate detection, error classification, and summary reports.
Added browser screenshot/console/network/trace collector using Playwright with safe-click defaults.
Added dashboard Observability panel (観測・診断) to visualize events, browser runs, screenshots, duplicate groups, and error findings.
Added scripts/run_dashboard_observability.sh for staged dashboard launch, browser collection, and summary generation.
Added pyproject optional extras: browser and observability.
Kept DB writes, dataset writes, db-init, model training, and destructive browser clicks out of default flows.

executed_checks.ruff/mypy/bandit: NOT_RUN in sandbox; run ./scripts/repair_static.sh locally after uv setup
